description: Your research group bulk-imported 25 biology and medicine papers into Zotero, resulting in metadata corruption. Audit the library and fix all metadata errors, including incorrect publication years, transposed primary author names, and placeholder abstracts. The library is considered clean when every paper has a plausible publication year, correct author name formatting, and either a valid abstract or no abstract.

year_errors.title: Caspase Activation Mechanisms in Apoptotic Cell Death
RNA Interference: Gene Silencing by Double-Stranded RNA
CRISPR-Cas9-Mediated Genome Editing in Human Cells
Stem Cell-Derived Cerebral Organoids Model Human Brain Development
Single-Cell RNA Sequencing Reveals Transcriptional Heterogeneity

name_errors.title: Molecular Mechanisms of Synaptic Vesicle Endocytosis
Chromatin Remodeling Complexes and Gene Regulation
Insulin Signaling and the Regulation of Glucose Metabolism
The Role of MicroRNAs in Cancer Biology

abstract_placeholders: Mechanisms of Antibiotic Resistance in Gram-Negative Bacteria
The Gut Microbiome and Human Health
Immune Checkpoint Blockade in Cancer Therapy
Protein Structure Prediction Using Deep Learning
